caption: A woman with dark hair and black-rimmed glasses is centered against a plain, dark gray background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved tunic with intricate embroidery around the neckline and a dark necklace. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking and gesturing with her hands to emphasize her points. In the first frame, her mouth is open and her hands are positioned low in front of her. By the second frame, she closes her eyes and purses her lips. In the third frame, her eyes reopen and her hands move slightly higher. In the final frame, she continues speaking with her mouth open and her hands raised further, palms facing inward. A small, circular orange and gold logo with the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom corners of the frames.
